center.name: 卡爾古利
center.summary: 卡爾古利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑吸蜜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In South Australia, it occurs in the south-east and it is widespread in the central and northern regions of Western Australia, with some rare sightings in the south near Kalgoorlie

links.label: 分布于
